steps.label: 4 instalments during construction
steps.detail: You pay the remaining amount in 4 equal instalments — upon completion of each construction phase.

footer.tagline: A gated complex of family houses on Mount Avala — 20 minutes from Belgrade.

about.title: About us
paragraphs: Welcome to Avala Home Concept — your destination for a more comfortable, higher-quality and healthier way of life in the beautiful area of Mount Avala, near Belgrade. Our mission is to provide you with luxury houses of modern design that will meet all your needs and let you enjoy life surrounded by wonderful nature.

Every house in our offer is carefully designed and built to provide maximum comfort and convenience for larger families. Our team of experts works with passion and dedication so that each house is exceptionally designed and equipped with the highest-quality materials. Every detail is carefully thought out to create harmony between interior and exterior, creating a pleasant environment for you and your family.

We are located in a beautiful spot overlooking the magnificent Avala Tower, giving you the privilege of enjoying a stunning landscape every day and feeling the peace and serenity that come with living in nature. Our houses are designed to give you privacy and intimacy, while at the same time allowing easy connection to the local community and all the amenities the city offers.

We believe in the importance of a healthy lifestyle, so we have made sure our houses are energy efficient and sustainable. We use advanced technologies and environmentally friendly materials to reduce our ecological footprint and provide you with a space where you can live mindful of the importance of preserving nature.
about.investorText: The Ćirić Family has been successfully building and operating on the Serbian market for 30 years. Our construction companies have thousands of successfully completed projects and satisfied clients behind them. Our long-standing experience makes us a reliable, trusted partner with the knowledge, expertise and workforce to carry out all kinds of construction work quickly, with quality and as agreed.

project1.title: Project 1 — Single-storey house 139m²
project1.description: A spacious single-storey house of 139 square meters. This modernly designed house also features two parking spaces and a pool. As many as three airy and comfortable rooms are positioned to receive plenty of sunlight, giving you an extra lift of mood every morning. A large living room with an open-concept kitchen and dining area for family gatherings, with sliding doors that open onto a terrace overlooking the pool in your own yard.

project2.title: Project 2 — Family house 147m²
project2.description: A comfortable family house of 147 m² surrounded by nature and a pleasant atmosphere. Step into a spacious living room with large glass doors that look out onto the beautiful greenery of Mount Avala. This modern family house has three bedrooms, two separate bathrooms, a jacuzzi (optional) and a large dining room connected to the living room.
